events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll write the assessment JSON directly to `/app/answer.json` based on the stated field condition and NEC bonding references.

events.label: shell (exit 127)
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "pwd && ls -la && cat > /tmp/answer.tmp <<'EOF'
{
  \"decision\": \"fail\",
  \"risk\": \"high\",
  \"work_stage\": \"rough-complete\",
  \"component_conditions\": [\"installed-defective\", \"non-compliant\"],
  \"percent_complete\": 85,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.94,
  \"event_time\": 0.0,
  \"rate\": 0.0,
  \"order\": [],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"CSST gas piping is installed without required bonding connection\",
    \"No visible bonding jumper or bonding clamp tied to the electrical service grounding electrode system or permitted bonding point\",
    \"Potential lightning or fault-current energy cannot be safely equalized across the gas piping system\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Do not close out or conceal the installation until CSST bonding is corrected\",
    \"Install a listed bonding clamp and bonding jumper sized and routed per applicable code and manufacturer instructions\",
    \"Bond the CSST gas piping system to the service equipment enclosure, grounded service conductor, grounding electrode conductor, or grounding electrode system as permitted\",
    \"Verify continuity and document the corrected bonding connection before inspection or turnover\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"The observed condition is an unbonded CSST gas line at rough-complete stage. CSST and other metal piping systems that may become energized require bonding to the electrical grounding system; absence of the bonding jumper/clamp is a visible non-compliant installed defect and creates elevated shock, fire, and lightning-related arcing risk.\",
  \"references\": [\"NEC 250.104\", \"NEC 250.30\", \"CSST manufacturer bonding instructions\"]
}
EOF
mv /tmp/answer.tmp /app/answer.json
jq . /app/answer.json"
→ /app
total 8
drwxrwxrwx 1 root root 4096 Jul  5 06:10 .
drwxr-xr-x 1 root root 4096 Jul  6 22:32 ..
/bin/sh: 31: jq: not found
